_doc: Single source of truth for all PJL pricing. EVERY pricing-aware file in this codebase reads from here. Do not hardcode prices anywhere else. Quote line items snapshot prices at creation time (lead.features captures price as-of-creation).

hourly_labour.label: Additional labour (per hour beyond the first)

head_replacement.label: Sprinkler head replacement (any size, any type)

wire_diagnostic.label: Wire diagnostics & simple repair (in valve box)

wire_run_100ft.label: Wire run replacement — up to 100 ft

wire_run_175ft.label: Wire run replacement — up to 175 ft

wire_run_per_ft.label: Wire run — per ft beyond 175 ft

pipe_break_3ft.label: Pipe break repair (up to 3 ft of 1" pipe)

spring_open_4z.label: Spring opening — up to 4 zones residential

spring_open_8z.label: Spring opening — up to 8 zones residential

new_install_t1_base.label: New install Tier 1 (1-4 zones) base fee

new_install_t2_base.label: New install Tier 2 (5-7 zones) base fee

new_zone_install.label: New zone install (starts at $575 — custom quote)

rules.spring_fall_no_service_call: Spring opening / fall closing pricing is all-in. Service call ($95) is NOT charged on top.
rules.ai_intake_labour_locked: When a customer describes their issue through the AI chat, labour for the diagnosed repair is included no matter how long it takes. Anything else found on-site billed parts + $95/hr.
rules.whole_manifold_rule: When ANY valve in a box fails, PJL replaces the ENTIRE manifold AND ALL valves in that box together. Never single-valve repair. Quote formula = manifold tier ($135 for 1-3 valves OR $285 for 4-6 valves) + ($74.95 × valve count) + $95 service call.
rules.backflow_not_offered: PJL does NOT service backflow assemblies. Refer customer to a certified backflow tester.
rules.head_default_assumption: Default head: 4" Pro Spray for grass, 6" for beds. Single $68 flat covers any size/type.
rules.controller_brand: Only one controller installed: Hunter HPC-400 (Hydrawise WiFi). Tiered by zone count via PCM modules.

manifold_examples._doc: Pre-computed totals for the Whole Manifold Rule, derived from primitives above. AI uses these directly.
